codeReview.summary: The schema/CRUD implementation matches the milestone contract: org-scoped axisDefinitions storage, RBAC-gated mutations, immutable keys, validation for snake_case keys and positive weights, and authenticated org-scoped reads are all implemented and covered by focused convex tests.

summary: Pass: the backend axis library CRUD feature satisfies its contract and I did not find blocking or non-blocking issues in the reviewed diff.
